title: BRAIN Journal-About the Design of QUIC Firefox Transport Protocol-Figure 4. QUIC Streams and FEC packets
author: Vraj Pandya
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The FEC mechanism is flexible, which means that the protocol adapts the number of packets that need to be incorporated in one FEC packet according to the packets that are lost. The number of packets in one FEC packet is inversely related to the number of packets lost (illustrated in Figure 4).
steps_raw: The FEC mechanism is flexible, which means that the protocol adapts the number of packets that need to be incorporated in one FEC packet according to the packets that are lost. The number of packets in one FEC packet is inversely related to the number of packets lost (illustrated in Figure 4).
